title: The Way to Freedom
writer: Harald Braun, Jacob Geis, Rolf Hansen
actors: Zarah Leander, Hans Stüwe, Siegfried Breuer
plot: In Vienna, during the 1848 Revolution, opera singer Antonia Corvelli marries Detlev von Blossin, a rich landowner. But, as she refuses to give up her career, her infuriated husband returns to Pomerania without her. After falling i...
